what if your looking for a long trade, the 9ema crosses ABOVE the 20EMA and you get your candle breakout through the zone. BUTTTT your candles are trading already pretty close to the previous session highs. That's a trade you wont take right? 

And second question what if exactly the same scenario but now BOTH your previous session highs and session lows are WAYY below the entry candle
Do you have a discord or web site where I can follow you?

So then the 9 and the 20 ema is only for direction purposes, opening candle has to be between previous session high-low, the 7am- 7:30am candle get boxed in and if a breakout occurs and closes outside the box then you go long/short in that direction and aim for a 1:1 or 1:2 rr, S/L can be previous candle wick or the opposite side of the box, the only thing that’ll mess this up is if the opening is at or below the low or up and above the high while the breakout also goes that way.
